## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Infra / config change
- [ ] Test coverage addition

## Docs Impact

> **Required.** Every PR must address this section. If docs are not affected, state why explicitly.

- [ ] `AGENT.md` updated (if project structure, architecture, protocols, or branch flow changed)
- [ ] `docs/agent-mode.md` updated (if agent ops added, removed, or changed)
- [ ] Domain doc updated (if behavior of nostr, wallet, worker, or CLI changed)
- [ ] `taskify-cli/README.md` updated (if CLI commands changed)
- [ ] No docs update needed — reason: <!-- explain -->

## Test Coverage

- [ ] New tests added for changed behavior
- [ ] Existing tests still pass (`npm test` in `taskify-pwa/`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint` in `taskify-pwa/`)
- [ ] No tests added — reason: <!-- explain (e.g. pure docs change, infrastructure) -->

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] Branched from `New_Features_Fixes` (not `main` or `Beta`)
- [ ] No secrets, keys, or `.dev.vars` content committed
- [ ] No product code changes in a docs-only PR (and vice versa where possible)
- [ ] Wallet / Cashu changes flagged for second review: **Yes / No / N/A**
- [ ] Nostr event schema changes flagged for sign-off: **Yes / No / N/A**
